description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a landscaped plot featuring a central building surrounded by trees, a driveway, and a tennis court. The main structure has a flat roof with multiple skylights and large, floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front approach is marked by a wide staircase leading to a spacious patio, flanked by manicured lawns and decorative shrubs. The rear of the property includes a swimming pool, a shaded outdoor seating area, and direct access to the tennis court. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored concrete, glass, and metal accents, giving it a sleek, minimalist appearance. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear pathways and recreational spaces integrated into the design.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a tennis court, all set within a tree-lined property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide staircase, patio, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and lawns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, extensive windows, pool area, and adjacent tennis court.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, shaded seating area, and direct access to the tennis court, with trees lining the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tennis court, pool, and the building's modern, flat-roofed profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
